# Codex Task Template

## Title

State the task in one concrete sentence.

## Problem

What bounded problem needs to be solved?

## Thesis Context

What part of the thesis this task supports, and what scope it must respect.

## Relevant Files

List the files the task should start from.

## Constraints

- keep the model or artifact interpretable
- respect current thesis scope and non-goals
- prefer simple defensible abstractions
- do not change assumptions not explicitly reopened

## Acceptance Criteria

- define the expected artifact
- define the expected behavior or output
- define documentation expectations

## Tests / Checks

- state what to run or inspect
- state what evidence counts as success

## Assumptions Not To Change

List the thesis assumptions this task should treat as fixed.
